text.title: PM 1:1 Template for Engineering and Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid PM 1:1 Template for Engineering and Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: single template for all partners (role differences ignored)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: templates populated with a typed value
action_tracker_url populated with a typed value
async_prep_policy populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
